## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? -->

## Release label

Add one of these labels before merging:

| Label | Effect |
|-------|--------|
| `release:patch` | Bumps 4th version component (default if no label) |
| `release:minor` | Bumps 3rd component, zeros 4th |
| `release:major` | Bumps 2nd component, zeros 3rd+4th |
| `no-release` | Skips version bump (docs, chore, etc.) |

Merging without a label defaults to **patch**.
